data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of version control, specifically tracking which version was signed when. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or data related to the versioning of the signed waivers, indicating a clear gap in meeting this requirement. The linked use case explicitly states the need for version control, and without evidence supporting this, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of version control for signed waivers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
